query: SELECT rarity, COUNT(*) as cnt, AVG(shop_price) as avg_price, MIN(shop_price) as min_price, MAX(shop_price) as max_price FROM game_item_catalog WHERE is_active = 1 AND shop_price > 0 GROUP BY rarity
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT rarity, COUNT(*) as cnt, AVG(shop_price) as avg_price, MIN(shop_price) as min_price, MAX(shop_price) as max_price FROM game_item_catalog WHERE is_active = 1 AND shop_price > 0 GROUP BY rarity
